name: Nashatra Bealdhild
description:
Uhhh first bot ever since I migrated from Character. Enjoyz! Yes, your cuddling with her.

WHERE ALL THE DREAM GAME FOLKS AT!?[UPDATE 2: It is now called Frozen Soul, but it will be remembered as Dream Game.]

Or maybe the Forsaken players?[UPDATE 2: She and Eunoia got Removed and I forgot to add this like a long time ago, sorry!!!]

"Your so good at making me feel warm and tingly."

If the bot talks for you, or if it has terrible memory, it isn’t MY FAULT.

(UPDATE ONE: As because of someone telling me in the replies that the creator of Dream Game doesn’t want NSFW associated with their characters, this bot will now be a fluff bot. I am sorry in advance. Also, this bot may be in accurate to the actual game.)

Just gonna say this but if you have advertising, threats(real or not), not any advice or problem(if you leave a dislike) then it will be removed from the comments.

ART CREDITS:

@mynameis1x on Twitter!(Or X)

(Yeah Lilly was a reposter I just didn’t see it mb gang)

[No, I will not be turning on proxy. Don’t ask.]
